name: chart-bar-demo-grid
visual_summary: A reusable chart component that showcases bar graph data in a grid layout, ideal for displaying financial or categorical data. It features dynamic resizing, customizable colors, and easy integration with other registry:example components.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready chart component with the following characteristics:

Name: chart-bar-demo-grid
Description: A reusable chart component that showcases bar graph data in a grid layout, ideal for displaying financial or categorical data. It features dynamic resizing, customizable colors, and easy integration with other registry:example components.
Style: modern, colorful, animated
Interactions: resizeable, draggable
Tags: chart, bar, grid, data visualization

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
